issues.objection: guṇa-karma-vibhāgaśaḥ is preserved as the explicit criterion. The engineering archetype mapping (architect / builder / mentor / operator) honors this. The verse's contested-historical-caste reading is explicitly NOT smuggled in. The minor caveat: even an honest dispositional typology in engineering organizations risks sliding into stereotype if not held carefully. The falsifiability test ('could the same person, given different formative experience, have become a different archetype?') addresses this.

notes: Per chapter thesis, MAXIMUM care taken on this verse. The engineering analog honors what Krishna actually says (guṇa-karma) and explicitly disavows the historical caste-by-birth reading. STRETCHED tag honest. PASS_WITH_CAVEAT counted as PASS.
